Tests the `Math.atan2` function with specific input values to verify it returns `-Math.PI`.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion statement that tests the behavior of the `Math.atan2` function in JavaScript. It checks if the result of `Math.atan2` when called with `-0` and `-Number.MIN_VALUE` as arguments is equal to `-Math.PI`. This test ensures that the `Math.atan2` function correctly handles edge cases involving negative zero and the smallest positive number representable in JavaScript. The assertion is part of a test suite to verify the mathematical accuracy and compliance of the JavaScript `Math` library with expected standards.
